top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 92, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 92 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
GFNY Maryland Cambridge's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
Race-pace efforts that mimic GFNY Maryland Cambridge's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before October.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 92 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of GFNY Maryland Cambridge. Train it until it feels boring.
GFNY Maryland Cambridge's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 92 miles.
At GFNY Maryland Cambridge, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 92 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what GFNY Maryland Cambridge's mixed terrain actually does to you.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.

race_overlay.heat: October in Cambridge, Maryland, USA. Begin heat acclimatization 10–14 days before GFNY Maryland Cambridge — 20–30min sauna sessions or midday rides in full kit. Pre-load sodium 48 hours out. Target 500–750ml/hr with electrolytes on race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for GFNY Maryland Cambridge’s 92 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Endurance, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 92 miles of mixed terrain in Cambridge, Maryland, USA.
